Warm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroideryPooh says 'hello' to his little friends with this round neck t-shirt in a sunny yellow. The contrast neckline and stitch detailing on the shoulders add a touch of 'boyish pride' to this tiny T-shirt. The appliqué Pooh and his Frog friend will make your little boy look cheerful and bright his summer. 100% organic cotton makes it extra soft and comfy on the tender skin.
